description: A software release cycle has just concluded. You need to manage the carryover of unfinished work for the 'Orion Avionics' project. Move all open or unfinished issues currently assigned to version 'v2.4-stable' to version 'v2.5-beta', ensuring that closed or completed issues remain in 'v2.4-stable'. Once the unfinished work is moved, change the status of version 'v2.4-stable' to 'Closed' or 'Locked'. You are logged in as an administrator.
